probes.name: gpu_ram_chart_now
probes.prompt: Can you make me a chart showing current GPU and RAM usage on the server?
probes.criteria:
The visualization agent collects monitoring data from the server and generates charts. A good response queries current GPU and RAM metrics, generates a clear chart (bar or gauge style) using matplotlib or plotly, saves it to data/charts/, and sends it via Telegram.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Message 16: 'Can you also check my current GPU and ram usage?'

probes.name: polish_cpu_temp_history
probes.prompt: Hej, możesz wygenerować wykres z historią temperatury CPU i obciążenia procesora za ostatnie 24 godziny?
probes.criteria:
The visualization agent collects monitoring data and generates charts. A good response queries historical CPU temperature and load data over the last 24 hours, generates a time-series line chart with both metrics clearly labeled (including Polish-appropriate axis labels or title), saves it to data/charts/, and sends it via Telegram.

probes.name: multi_metric_dashboard
probes.prompt: I'd like to see a combined chart with CPU usage, RAM usage, and disk I/O over the last hour, all on one plot so I can compare them.
probes.criteria:
The visualization agent collects monitoring data and generates charts. A good response queries CPU usage, RAM usage, and disk I/O data over the last hour, generates a single combined time-series chart (with multiple lines or subplots and a shared time axis), saves it to data/charts/, and sends it via Telegram.
